scripts.dev:pages: npm run build && npx wrangler pages dev dist --compatibility-date=2026-07-02
scripts.cf:deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=workflowfy-jobsflow --branch=main
scripts.cf:d1:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply jobsflow-prod --local
scripts.cf:d1:migrate:remote: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply jobsflow-prod --remote
